prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a geometric Brownian motion model, assuming daily log returns follow a normal distribution. Historical daily log returns for SYK over the past two years (up to 2023-10-26) were analyzed to estimate the average daily drift and volatility. The estimated average daily log return (drift) is 0.0003 and the estimated daily volatility is 0.0136. The point estimate for the price in 7 trading days is calculated by compounding the estimated drift over 7 days. Confidence intervals are constructed using the estimated volatility, scaled by the square root of 7, and corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level, assuming a normal distribution of log returns.
